Title: Spiderhead
Writer: George Saunders, Rhett Reese, Paul Wernick
Actors: Chris Hemsworth, Miles Teller, Jurnee Smollett
Plot: This is set in the near future, when convicts are offered the chance to volunteer as medical subjects in hopes of shortening their sentences. When one prisoner finds himself the test patient for a new pharmaceutical capable of generating feelings of love, he begins questioning the reality of his emotions and sets out to discover the truth.
